_comment: Known-bad OpenAlex journal names. Key = DOI (no https://doi.org/). Values: wrong_journal (what OpenAlex returns), correct_journal (verified via DOI landing page).

10.1177/01640275261456210.note: OpenAlex/Section-9 returns wrong name; DOI landing page confirms Research on Aging (SAGE). LS22-008 (Bordone). Verified Issue #2.
